markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 520. Misc. Provisions
##### § 520.061 — Criminal Penalty

(a) A person commits an offense if the person violates this subchapter or a rule adopted by the county tax assessor-collector under this subchapter.

(b) An offense under this section is a Class A misdemeanor.

*Added by Acts 1999, 76th Leg., ch. 1478, Sec. 2, eff. Sept. 1, 1999.*

subsections.label: a
